---
id: invalidate-a-customer
title: "Invalidate a customer"
description: "Replaces the customer's ReferenceCustomer with a randomly generated identifier and revokes all its portal links."
sidebar_label: "Invalidate a customer"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/proabono-api-live
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Invalidate a customer"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/Customer/Invalidation"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Replaces the customer's ReferenceCustomer with a randomly generated identifier and revokes all its portal links.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
